text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, refers to computer systems designed to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. Machine learning is a key part of AI, where computers learn patterns from data without being explicitly programmed for every step. Deep learning goes further by using complex neural networks, similar to the human brain, to process large amounts of information. You already encounter AI in daily life: virtual assistants like Siri or Alexa, streaming service recommendations, and email spam filters all rely on these technologies to function smoothly and improve over time.
